text:
[S6] G.E.
Cokayne; with Vicary Gibbs, H.A.
Doubleday, Geoffrey White, Duncan Warrand Lord Howard Walden, editors, Complete Peerage England, Scotland, Ireland, Great Britain United Kingdom, Extant, Extinct Dormant, ed., volumes (1910-1959; reprint volumes, Gloucester, U.K.: Alan Sutton Publishing, 2000), volume page 507.
Hereinafter cited Complete Peerage.
From 1620, married name became Petre.
After marriage, Hon.
Mary Browne styled Baroness Petre 1637.
[S22] Bernard Burke, C.B.
LL.D., Genealogical History Dormant, Abeyant, Forfeited, Extinct Peerages British Empire, edition (1883; reprint, Baltimore, Maryland: Genealogical Publishing Company, 1978), page Hereinafter cited Burkes Extinct Peerage.
